calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-04-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-04-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Katy Bersamin #11722.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for the Plaintiff: Capital One Bank, N.A.
copy of Declarations in support filed with the court were presented to the court for review.
No appearance by Defendant Joanna S. Duong.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Damages $2626.31
Attorney Fees $1575.00
Prejudgment Interest $305.83
Costs $339.50.00, for a total of $4,846.64
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2012 Set For Trial On Jun-04-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
